meta_title: For Students: project management to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Project Management for Students: Stop Slow Dev Speed Now
content.seo_description: Overcome slow development speed with expert project management. A beginner-friendly guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to build your first SaaS app.
content.answer_block: Slow development speed stems from poor scope management and lack of structured workflows. By integrating Antigravity for architectural planning and Claude Code for rapid implementation, you transform abstract ideas into production-ready code. This structured approach allows you to ship faster, maintain focus, and build a professional-grade portfolio.
content.intro:
You sit down to code, but the sheer scale of the project paralyzes you. Hours vanish into refactoring spaghetti code, and the feature you promised yourself you'd finish remains an unreachable horizon. This isn't a lack of talent; it is a lack of architecture. The difference between a struggling student and a senior engineer is the ability to break the monolithic void into manageable, high-velocity tasks.

Welcome to the turning point. Today, we bridge the gap between 'I'm learning' and 'I'm shipping.' We are going to harness Antigravity for high-level system design and Claude Code to execute the logic, effectively turning your development environment into an automated production line.

steps.title: Define the MVP Scope
steps.description: Before writing code, define the core functionality. This prevents feature creep and keeps development focused on the primary value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior Architect. Define a minimal viable product scope for a [Project Name] that can be built in 48 hours. Focus on three core features only.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate a project roadmap based on this scope: [Paste Scope]'

steps.title: Establish the Folder Architecture
steps.description: A clean directory structure is the foundation of maintainability. We use AI to generate a standard scalable structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a production-ready directory structure for a full-stack SaaS application using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code 'Create the file structure based on the provided architecture'

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Stop typing repetitive setup code. Use Claude Code to scaffold your database models and API routes instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the database schema and API route boilerplate for user authentication and data CRUD operations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code 'Generate the schema.prisma file and implement the auth API route'

steps.title: Implement Iterative Logic
steps.description: Build one feature at a time using automated testing to ensure the foundation remains stable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the business logic for the [Feature Name] module, ensuring it follows clean code principles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code 'Write the logic for [Feature Name] and include unit tests'

steps.title: Review and Refactor
steps.description: Use AI to identify bottlenecks or security vulnerabilities in your codebase before deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a senior-level code review on the current implementation. Identify performance bottlenecks and suggest optimizations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code 'Review the current codebase for security flaws and performance issues'

pro_tips: Always commit your code after every successful feature implementation to create a clean 'history of victories'.
Use Antigravity to simulate 'what-if' scenarios before committing to a database schema change.
Treat Claude Code as a junior developer: review every suggestion, but let it handle the heavy lifting of boilerplate.
Documentation is code. Use your AI prompts to automatically generate your README file as you build.
Prioritize your 'Shipping Velocity' over 'Feature Richness' in your first three projects.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to Vercel, share your live link on social media to build your professional brand, and start planning your next, more complex feature.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student; you are a builder. The tools are in your hands, and the path to mastery is clear. Stop waiting for the 'perfect' time to start. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
